title: Cream Cheese Garlic Bread Korean

seo.title: Korean Cream Cheese Garlic Bread Recipe - Easy & Delicious
seo.metaDescription: Learn how to make the best Korean Cream Cheese Garlic Bread at home! This easy recipe combines savory garlic with sweet cream cheese for a viral sensation.

Tips for the Perfect Korean Cream Cheese Garlic Bread
seo.imageAlt: A close-up of freshly baked Korean Cream Cheese Garlic Bread, golden brown with creamy filling.
seo.imageCaption: Indulge in the viral sensation: homemade Korean Cream Cheese Garlic Bread, a perfect blend of sweet and savory.

description: Indulge in the viral sensation that is Korean Cream Cheese Garlic Bread, a delightful fusion of sweet and savory flavors. This popular street food features soft bread generously filled with a creamy, slightly sweet cream cheese mixture and then drenched in a rich, buttery garlic sauce. Perfect as a snack, appetizer, or a unique treat, it is a must-try for any Korean food enthusiast.

ingredients.notes: like brioche buns or soft dinner rolls

instructions.title: Prepare the Bread
instructions.text: Slice each round bread roll into 6-8 equal wedges, cutting almost all the way through but leaving the bottom intact so the bread stays together like a flower. This creates pockets for the filling.

instructions.title: Make the Cream Cheese Filling
instructions.text: In a small bowl, combine the softened cream cheese, granulated sugar, and heavy cream or milk. Mix until the mixture is smooth and creamy. Transfer this delightful filling into a piping bag or a sturdy ziploc bag with a corner snipped off.

instructions.title: Fill the Bread Rolls
instructions.text: Carefully open the wedges of each bread roll and pipe the cream cheese filling generously into the gaps and crevices. Ensure an even distribution of the creamy filling throughout the bread, reaching all the way to the bottom.

instructions.title: Prepare the Garlic Butter Sauce
instructions.text: In another bowl, whisk together the melted unsalted butter, finely minced garlic, chopped fresh parsley, the large egg, and salt. For an extra touch of sweetness and shine, you may also add the optional sweetened condensed milk to this aromatic sauce.

instructions.title: Dip and Coat the Bread
instructions.text: Preheat your oven to 180C (350F). Take each filled bread roll and thoroughly dip it into the garlic butter sauce, making sure to fully coat all sides and especially the cream cheese-filled crevices. If dipping is too messy, use a spoon to generously pour the sauce over each bread.

instructions.title: Bake to Golden Perfection
instructions.text: Place the thoroughly coated bread rolls on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper. Bake in the preheated oven for 15-20 minutes, or until the bread turns a beautiful golden brown and the cream cheese filling is warm and slightly gooey. Keep an eye on it to prevent over-browning.

instructions.title: Serve Warm and Enjoy
instructions.text: Once baked, remove the Korean Cream Cheese Garlic Bread from the oven and let it cool slightly for a few minutes before serving. For an extra flourish, garnish with a sprinkle of fresh parsley. This bread is best enjoyed warm!

tips: For the best texture, use brioche buns or a soft milk bread. Day-old bread works exceptionally well as it tends to absorb the garlic butter sauce better, resulting in a more flavorful bread.

Adjust the sweetness of the cream cheese filling and the garlic butter sauce to your preference. Some prefer a sweeter bread, while others might lean towards a more savory profile. Taste and adjust accordingly.
If you do not have a piping bag, a sturdy ziploc bag with one corner snipped off works perfectly for easily filling the bread with the cream cheese mixture without any mess.
article: Cream Cheese Garlic Bread Korean is a beloved Korean Baking dish enjoyed across Korean. This authentic recipe brings traditional flavors to your kitchen.
